nodes.label: ANTHROPIC
nodes.description: Anthropic is a company that specializes in artificial intelligence services, prominently known for its Claude Pro subscription service. The organization is dedicated to advancing AI research and safety, and it is the driving force behind the development of Claude, an AI model designed to enhance user interaction and safety in AI applications.

nodes.label: CLAUDE PRO
nodes.description: Claude Pro is a subscription service offered by Anthropic, PBC. It is billed on a yearly basis, with the current billing cycle running from March 29, 2026, to March 29, 2027. Notably, the user has successfully canceled their subscription to Claude Pro.
